chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-184 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 15-10-2025. None present for the petitioner. Mir Naeem Talpur, Additional A.G Mr. Shahzado Saleem, Additional P.G. = Through instant petition, the petitioner has sought following relief(s): a) To direct the respondents No.3 and 5 not to cause any sort of harassment to the petitioner and his family members at the instance of the respondents No.6 to 11 and not to interfere in their peaceful life. b). To direct the respondents No. 2 to 5 to provide legal protection to the petitioner and his family members with due course of law. c). Any other relief(s) which this honorable court deems fit, just and proper in favour of the petitioner. In pursuance to court notice, respondents No.2 and 3 filed their reply/ comments, whereas respondents No.4 to 6 have chosen to remain absent. Needless to remark that official respondents are under obligation to provide protection to the petitioner without fear and favour. It is expected that the official respondents shall conduct themselves in accordance with law and ensure that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioner on account of his personal dispute with the private respondents. In view of above, instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE *Saleem*
